title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at NoBroker - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? NoBroker in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!
